lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਉ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh paaeaa naam hau gur kau vaariaa |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I have obtained the Naam; I am a sacrifice to the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰੁ ਦਰੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਮਹਲੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ghar dar paavai mehal naam piaariaa |
lines.english: He obtains his own home and mansion, by loving the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਵਾ ਬਲੈ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: deevaa balai andheraa jaae |
lines.english: When the lamp is lit, the darkness is dispelled;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਸਿਰਜਨਹਾਰਿਆ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: too aap savaareh aap sirajanahaariaa |16|
lines.english: You Yourself embellish and adorn us, O Creator Lord. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਗਿਆਨ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਮਿਟੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeh giaan pragaas agiaan mittant |
lines.english: Wherever spiritual wisdom appears, ignorance is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਗਵੈ ਸੂਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੈ ਚੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: augavai soor na jaapai chand |
lines.english: When the sun rises, the moon is not visible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪਾਠ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bed paatth sansaar kee kaar |
lines.english: Reading the Vedas is the world's occupation;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪਾਠ ਮਤਿ ਪਾਪਾ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bed paatth mat paapaa khaae |
lines.english: reading the Vedas, sinful intellect is destroyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜੑਿ ਪੜੑਿ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਕਰਹਿ ਬੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: parra parra panddit kareh beechaar |
lines.english: the Pandits read them, study them and contemplate them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਉਤਰਸਿ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh utaras paar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh is carried across. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਸਭ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: bin boojhe sabh hoe khuaar |
lines.english: Without understanding, all are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੈ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਲਗੋ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabadai saad na aaeo naam na lago piaar |
lines.english: Those who do not savor the Word of the Shabad, do not love the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਫਿਕਾ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa fikaa bolanaa nit nit hoe khuaar |
lines.english: They speak insipidly with their tongues, and are continually disgraced.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੋ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ji prabh saalaahe aapanaa so sobhaa paae |
lines.english: One who praises his God, receives honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak peiai kirat kamaavanaa koe na mettanahaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they act according to the karma of their past actions, which no one can erase. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: haumai vichahu door kar sach man vasaae |
lines.english: He drives out egotism from within himself, and enshrines the True Name within his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰੈ ਸਚਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sach baanee gun ucharai sachaa sukh paae |
lines.english: Through the True Word of the Guru's Bani, he chants the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and finds true peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਇਵ ਸੁਧੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: man mailaa iv sudh hai har naam dhiaae |17|
lines.english: In this way, his filthy mind is cleansed and purified, and he meditates on the Name of the Lord. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਲੁ ਭਇਆ ਚਿਰੀ ਵਿਛੁੰਨਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mel bheaa chiree vichhuniaa gur purakh milaae |
lines.english: He is united with the Lord, after being separated for so long; the Guru, the Primal Being, unites him with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕੂਮਲ ਫੁਲ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਪਸਿ ਮਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa koomal ful gun naanak gupas maal |
lines.english: With the fresh leaves of the body, and the flowers of virtue, Nanak has weaved his garland.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਨੀ ਫੁਲੀ ਰਉ ਕਰੇ ਅਵਰ ਕਿ ਚੁਣੀਅਹਿ ਡਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: enee fulee rau kare avar ki chuneeeh ddaal |1|
lines.english: The Lord is pleased with such garlands, so why pick any other flowers? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨਾ ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਨੑ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਕੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak tinaa basant hai jina ghar vasiaa kant |
lines.english: O Nanak, it is the spring season for those, within whose homes their Husband Lord abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੇ ਕੰਤ ਦਿਸਾਪੁਰੀ ਸੇ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਜਲੰਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin ke kant disaapuree se ahinis fireh jalant |2|
lines.english: But those, whose Husband Lord is far away in distant lands, continue burning, day and night. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਗੁਣ ਰਵਾ ਮਨੁ ਸਚੈ ਰਚਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: anadin sevee gun ravaa man sachai rachanee |
lines.english: Night and day, I serve the True Lord, and chant His Glorious Praises; my mind merges into Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase deaa kar gur satigur bachanee |
lines.english: The Merciful Lord Himself forgives those who dwell upon the Word of the Guru, the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਗਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਤ ਜਪਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur charanee lagiaa har naam nit japanee |
lines.english: Grasping hold of the feet of the True Guru, meditate continually on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਤੁ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਲਖਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: prabh meraa beant hai ant kinai na lakhanee |
lines.english: My God is infinite; no one knows His limit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲ ਬਸੰਤੈ ਆਗਮਨਿ ਪਹਿਲਾ ਮਉਲਿਓ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: pahil basantai aagaman pahilaa maulio soe |
lines.english: Spring brings forth the first blossoms, but the Lord blossoms earlier still.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਛੈ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਸੀ ਸਭਿ ਘਰੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਜਚਨੀ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: jo ichhai so fal paaeisee sabh gharai vich jachanee |18|
lines.english: Thus you shall obtain the fruits of your desires, and all wishes shall be fulfilled within your home. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਮਉਲਿਐ ਸਭ ਮਉਲੀਐ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਨ ਮਉਲਿਹੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jit mauliai sabh mauleeai tiseh na maulihu koe |1|
lines.english: By His blossoming, everything blossoms; no one else causes Him to blossom forth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak so saalaaheeai ji sabhasai de aadhaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise the One who gives Support to all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲ ਬਸੰਤੈ ਆਗਮਨਿ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: pahil basantai aagaman tis kaa karahu beechaar |
lines.english: He blossoms forth even earlier than the spring; reflect upon Him.

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿਐ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਨਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਜੇ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: miliai miliaa naa milai milai miliaa je hoe |
lines.english: By uniting, the united one is not united; he unites, only if he is united.

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰ ਆਤਮੈ ਜੋ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਕਹੀਐ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: antar aatamai jo milai miliaa kaheeai soe |3|
lines.english: But if he unites deep within his soul, then he is said to be united. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam salaaheeai sach kaar kamaavai |
lines.english: Praise the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, and practice truthful deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੀ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਗਿਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: doojee kaarai lagiaa fir jonee paavai |
lines.english: Attached to other deeds, one is consigned to wander in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਮੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam ratiaa naam paaeeai naame gun gaavai |
lines.english: Attuned to the Name, one obtains the Name, and through the Name, sings the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad salaaheeai har naam samaavai |
lines.english: Praising the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he merges in the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਕੋਈ ਕੋਇ ਮੰਞੁ ਨਿਮਾਣੀ ਇਕੁ ਤੂ ॥
lines.translit: kis hee koee koe many nimaanee ik too |
lines.english: Some people have others, but I am forlorn and dishonored; I have only You, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਫਲ ਹੈ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਫਲ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: satigur sevaa safal hai seviai fal paavai |19|
lines.english: Service to the True Guru is fruitful and rewarding; serving Him, the fruits are obtained. ||19||
